items.title: Washington man receives $1.8M bill from DHS for failing to leave the U.S.
items.dek: “He came to the U.S. when he was five years old,” Catala said. “He’s in his late 40s now.” He received a final order of removal in 2007, but his attorney says h
items.body: “He came to the U.S. when he was five years old,” Catala said. “He’s in his late 40s now.” He received a final order of removal in 2007, but his attorney says he has not been able to leave the country because Vietnam does not issue travel documents to some refugees. submitted by /u/SelectiveSanity [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'My mother cried out one last time': Palestinian boy, 12, describes how Israeli forces killed his family in car
items.dek: Khaled Bani Odeh's parents and two brothers were shot dead as they drove home from a shopping trip in the occupied West Bank.
items.body: Khaled Bani Odeh's parents and two brothers were shot dead as they drove home from a shopping trip in the occupied West Bank.
